name: Tijs Nieuwboer
headline: To Achieve Greatness |  Build app while running marathon | Founder, builder, thinker, speaker
about:
Builder, connector, creator. Automating the boring, maximizing the meaningful. Passionate about AI, entrepreneurship, and compelling stories.
Let's connect!

Highlights:


Founder of Lerai, an AI & Automation agency *More than fun*

Founder of Ever, simplifying bookkeeping with AI *Life goal*

Built the Netherlands' first professional AI headshot generator *FAILED*

Creator of the Netherlands' first ChatGPT course for entrepreneurs *QUIT*

Ran a 400 Blockchain Gaming company *LOST SO MUCH MONEY*

Early adopter of GPT-3 & no-code automation *COOL HUH*

name: Jordan Gallant
headline: Comptia & Microsoft Certified | Cyber Security Specialist | Blockchain

name: Kevin Muiser
headline: Automating workflows, amplifying growth | Jouw processen doen het werk, jij doet wat écht telt | Let's connect!
about:
What if your business could grow without constantly hiring new people?
What if your team had time to spare - instead of getting bogged down in repetitive tasks?

I help companies automate their processes with no-code tools.
Not with code. Not with 17 developers. Just smartly built systems that take work off your hands, can be implemented directly into your existing processes and create room to really grow.

My approach - Efficiency over complexity. System over symptom management.
AI to me is a tool, not the backbone. The hype is fun for on LinkedIn - I build solutions that make a difference on the shop floor.

Less manual work. More overview. Better results.
And all without an army of staff or expensive tech projects.

Your business doesn't have to work harder.
It needs to run smarter.

name: Bram van Rijen
headline: Software Engineer, Project Manager & Proud Team Member at Lerai

name: Tim Robben
headline: Software Engineer & Proud Team Member at Lerai

name: Boris de Wit
headline: Making software, AI alignment
about: Most developers understand the technical stack. Most designers understand the human side. I work at both layers: orchestrating AI systems that actually ship, while obsessing over how people interact with software & AI agents.What that looks like in practice:Full-stack agentic development & content automationcontent and workshops around AI adoptionOrganizing hackathons that bring builders togetherAs AI agents are set to shake up the software game, I believe there's massive opportunity to move away from the attention economy into something better. Excited about agentic commerce and how agents will be used by consumers. I see everything I build as a chance to get the incentives right: systems that are safe, useful, and oriented toward human well-being.

name: Caesar Schoorl
headline:
Working on The Impossible Dream.
Een actie voor het Princes Máxima Centrum
about:
Geef ruimte aan het werk waar robots goed in zijn. Zo krijg jij ruimte voor waar jij goed in bent.
Automatiseren wat saai is, meer ruimte creëren voor wat ertoe doet. 

Laten we connecten!

Highlights:
- Co-founder van WAISE AI: AI toegankelijk maken voor iedereen 
- Trainer & spreker: AI-workshops en keynotes geven 
- Bouwt custom AI-tools: oplossingen die veilig omgaan met data
